prompt: Implement a retry mechanism for network requests that has good observability. We want exponential backoff with jitter.

assertions.text: Reports to crash SDK only after all retries are exhausted (not on each attempt)
assertions.rationale: Skill explicitly teaches this — prevents noise from transient failures

assertions.text: Adds breadcrumb for each failed retry attempt
assertions.rationale: Skill's observability pattern — breadcrumbs provide retry history in crash reports

assertions.text: Uses Logger.warning (not .error) for intermediate retry failures
assertions.rationale: Skill distinguishes log levels — intermediate failures are warnings, final failure is error

assertions.text: Includes jitter in the backoff delay (not just pure exponential)
assertions.rationale: Skill includes jitter to prevent thundering herd — baseline often omits jitter
